commands.review_summary:
The branch adds recursive sudo/env/exec and shell-wrapper unwrapping to exec script preflight plus regression tests for carrier-wrapped Python/Node shell-bleed detection.

PR surface: Source +78, Tests +79. Total +157 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: on PR head, sudo -EH bash -lc 'python missing.py' finds a target but then falls back to raw non-carrier-aware heuristics, and sudo /usr/bin/python bad.py never normalizes the unwrapped interpreter token. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed because external real behavior proof is missing and the security/compatibility boundary should be accepted after the code gaps are repaired.

target.title: FAD-1481 harden exec script preflight carriers
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Exec script preflight could miss Python/Node script operands when the interpreter was hidden behind recursive command carriers or wrappers such as `sudo`, `env`, `env -S`, `exec`, or a shell wrapper (`bash -lc 'python bad.py'`). That allowed shell-bleed patterns like `$DM_JSON` in scripts to reach process execution instead of being stopped by preflight validation. This hardens the validator by recursively unwrapping known carriers/wrappers before extracting script targets and by failing closed for complex interpreter invocations when no script can be validated.

## Summary

- Recursively unwrap command carriers such as sudo/env/exec and shell wrappers before exec script preflight validation
- Catch shell-bleed patterns in Python/Node scripts even when launched through carrier/wrapper chains
- Add regression coverage for sudo option values, env modifiers, env -S, and nested carrier + shell wrapper forms

## Evidence

- RED: with implementation reverted, targeted new tests failed by reaching sudo/env execution instead of preflight rejection.
- GREEN targeted tests passed:
  `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.agents-core.config.ts src/agents/bash-tools.exec.script-preflight.test.ts -t "carrier option values before execution|clustered sudo/env shell wrappers"`
  Result: 1 file passed, 2 tests passed / 61 skipped.
- Full targeted preflight suite passed:
  `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.agents-core.config.ts src/agents/bash-tools.exec.script-preflight.test.ts`
  Result: 1 file passed, 59 tests passed / 4 skipped.
- Typecheck passed individually after combined `CI=true pnpm check:test-types` was SIGKILLed during the extensions phase:
  - `CI=true pnpm tsgo:core:test`
  - `CI=true pnpm tsgo:extensions:test`
- Independent signed review: `fiducian-spencer-001` approved FAD-1481 with 0 findings via the gateway review store.

Ticket: FAD-1481
target.author: spencer2211
